title: THE ESSENCE AND DIFFERENCES OF METHOD AND METHODOLOGY
author: Пардаев, Мамаюнус
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The article examines the essence and differences between the concepts of “method” and “methodology” as used in scientific and educational literature. It provides a comparative analysis of the content of these concepts, as well as their structure and distinctions in various fields.
steps_raw: The article examines the essence and differences between the concepts of “method” and “methodology” as used in scientific and educational literature. It provides a comparative analysis of the content of these concepts, as well as their structure and distinctions in various fields.
